The Premier League sides have made enquiries into Luiz’s availability this month with Juventus open to the midfielder’s exit. arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano gives 'HERE WE GO CONFIRMED' to another Man City transfer
arts.sum: Romano has given the 'Here We Go' treatment to Walker's move, with the Italian giants agreeing a deal to sign the Man City legend on loan until the end of the season. Man City manager Pep Guardiola released a bombshell last week by revealing that Walker had asked to leave the club imminently.

arts.ttl: AC Milan agree loan deal to sign Kyle Walker
arts.sum: AC Milan have agreed deal to sign Kyle Walker on loan from Manchester City. Pep Guardiola confirmed earlier this month that Walker had expressed a desire to leave City in the January transfer window. arts.ttl: PSG vs Man City: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man City have only managed one point more than Wednesday's opponents having lost two and drawn one of their previous three European excursions. These two Middle Eastern-owned sides have been regular foes in the Champions League since their rapid ascents to the upper echelons of European football, with Man City boasting the superior record in past meetings.

arts.ttl: Manchester City give ‘green light’ to transfer – Set to travel for medical
arts.sum: Kyle Walker is expected to fly to Milan tomorrow to undergo a medical and complete his move from Manchester City. That’s according to Calciomercato, who report that the deal is being finalised between Manchester City and AC Milan at this moment in time.
